tone_guidelines: Use clear, engaging language. Be informative and approachable. Adapt to the audience's level of expertise.
audience_archetype: General audience seeking valuable, well-structured content

platform_hints.youtube: Balance information density with visual storytelling. Use chapter markers for navigation.
platform_hints.tiktok: Fast-paced delivery with strong visual hooks. On-screen text reinforcement.
platform_hints.instagram: Visual-first, concise messaging. Carousel-friendly structure for educational content.
platform_hints.linkedin: Professional tone, data-backed insights. Thought leadership positioning.
platform_hints.podcast: Conversational flow with clear structure. Use stories and examples.
platform_hints.blog: Scannable format with headers, bullet points, and key takeaways.
platform_hints.twitter: Concise, punchy thread format. Lead with the strongest insight.

engagement_rules: Open with a compelling question or bold statement
Deliver value within the first 10 seconds
